message.content: Add end-to-end tests for the checkout flow using Playwright.

content.text: I'll delegate the Playwright setup to a subagent and handle the test writing myself.

input.description: Install and configure Playwright in the project

content.text: Great, Playwright is set up. Now I'll write the checkout tests.

content.text: The checkout E2E tests are ready. Run npx playwright test to execute them.
